title: Communication and Print Resources for Public Health | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:
sources for Public Health 
Aug. 14, 2024 
Key points 
CDC has a number of communication resources that public health partners can access to help promote vaccination. 
Find easy-to-download zip files on this page to use or share. 
Download collections of materials 
The following pages provide links to zip files so public health partners can download multiple files or multiple formats of the same file.
Keeps It That Way Resources 
Use these resources to raise awareness about diseases and the protection vaccines can provide. 
Sept. 9, 2024
